summary: Completed comprehensive testing of K&N Import Export admin portal revamp. All core features tested successfully including authentication, dashboard stats, kanban requests, inventory management, media library, and logout functionality.

integration_issues.flow: Admin portal access on production deployment
integration_issues.issue: Frontend dev server running on wrong port (3000 vs 3001) - static server conflicts with Vite proxy
integration_issues.details: Static file server on port 3000 prevents Vite dev server from properly proxying API requests. Vite server runs on 3001 with correct proxy functionality.

passed_tests: Admin login page shows clean layout without main site navbar
Admin login with admin1/KnAdmin2026! works and redirects to dashboard
Dashboard shows all required stats cards (New Requests, In Progress, Fulfilled, Inventory, Media Assets, Hero Images)
Dashboard shows Recent Requests section with View All link
Requests tab shows kanban pipeline with status columns
Inventory tab shows add product form and successfully adds items
Media Library tab shows drag-drop upload zone and category filters
Logout functionality works and redirects to login page
All backend API endpoints working correctly (admin/login, admin/inventory GET/POST)
Admin authentication system validates all three user accounts properly
Protected endpoints require valid authentication tokens
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend port configuration: The static file server on port 3000 conflicts with Vite dev server proxy. Either configure supervisor to use port 3001 for frontend access, or stop the static server and let Vite handle port 3000 with proper API proxying.
